query:
-- Insertar transacción contable faltante de PRES-2026-0017 (Natalia, 90€)
-- Reserva 630003, pago pendiente 30001 ya marcado como paid
INSERT INTO transactions (
  transactionNumber, type, amount, currency, paymentMethod, status,
  description, processedAt, clientName, clientEmail, clientPhone,
  productName, saleChannel, reservationId, quoteId,
  taxBase, taxAmount, reavMargin, fiscalRegime, operationStatus,
  createdAt, updatedAt
) VALUES (
  CONCAT('TX-PP-', UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000, '-PRES0017'),
  'ingreso',
  '90.00',
  'EUR',
  'efectivo',
  'completado',
  'Pago pendiente confirmado — Presupuesto Nayade Experiences — Natalia (PRES-2026-0017)',
  NOW(),
  'Natalia',
  'natalia@skicenter.es',
  '649567615',
  'Presupuesto Nayade Experiences',
  'crm',
  630003,
  540003,
  '74.38',
  '15.62',
  '0.00',
  'general_21',
  'confirmada',
  NOW(),
  NOW()
);
